## [00:00 - 01:01]

If you're all looking at me right now, I'd say would you see any blemishes on my face from that far back? I'm standing right next to you and you've got a beautiful face. Oh my goodness. I don't know where this story is going to go. Anyways, but here's the thing. Here's what you're all doing. When you see your issues or issues or problems or challenges, even the things that are going well in your life, it's from far back. And when we look at it from the far back, we can't really, you know, it's like, oh, it looks pretty good. You know, my house looks pretty clean. But guess what? If you come all the way to here, that's what we're doing. We're examining things under a microscope. And when it's this close, you're going to be able to see all the imperfections. You're going to be able to see all the things that aren't particularly great, acne, your scars or whatever. Don't be afraid of that. That's part of the process, you know, and it's going to be potentially emotional or it's going to evoke, you know, probably challenging feelings or whatnot. That's what these guys are here and I guess myself to help you work through that. It might be a little bit scary. It might be a little bit confronting, but that's okay. That's part of the process. Design the life you want to live. Don't leave this to chance.
